consumerTone: plain English; educational growth and bone genetics context only; no growth prediction, bone-density, osteoporosis, endocrine, pediatric, imaging, lab, exercise-clearance, diagnosis, treatment, supplement, or actionability claims

genomeEvidence.observedValue: calibrated growth model, height model, bone-density model, osteoporosis model, endocrine model, pediatric growth model, imaging evidence, lab evidence, supplement model, treatment context, exercise-clearance context, and ancestry applicability metadata unavailable in this fixture
